description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house complex featuring multiple attached units, each with its own driveway and garage. The front facade is characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and large rectangular windows, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property includes private front yards with small lawns, shrubs, and paved walkways, while the rear features spacious fenced gardens with trees, patios, and outdoor amenities such as a trampoline and seating areas. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by touches of gray and muted tones on the garages and vehicles. The layout is symmetrical, with each unit having direct access to both the street and the backyard. The overall design emphasizes functionality, privacy, and outdoor living space within an urban neighborhood context.
description: A modern, two-story row of attached houses with private driveways, garages, and spacious fenced backyards featuring greenery and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, garages, driveways, and landscaped front yards with vehicles parked.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the large fenced backyards, patios, garden features, and outdoor amenities like a trampoline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the back gardens, dense greenery, and patio areas behind the house units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard layout, garden structures, and the arrangement of the house interiors.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entryways with flat doors, small steps, and minimal overhangs, each unit featuring a private driveway and garage.
